---
name: Feature request
about: Propose something Tenet should do
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What's missing**
What you're trying to do that Tenet doesn't support today.

**Proposed shape**
Sketch the API if you have one in mind (e.g. a new `Tenet` method, a new
`recall()` kwarg, a new MCP tool). Doesn't need to be final.

**Why not a workaround**
If there's a way to do this today (even if clunky, e.g. calling `MemoryCore`
directly), say so — helps decide whether this needs new API surface or just
docs.

**Related**
Link any relevant section of `docs/DESIGN.md`, `docs/SOTA.md`, or a prior
issue/PR.
